ACCOUNT ID ( see attached document ) CASE # ( see attached document ) Note : A few of the transactions I highlighted were made by a non-authorized user. I was informed by representatives that their client, Destiny Boulougne, was using my credit card without my knowledge or consent. I did not know this woman.
